name: dev-tools
description: Development tooling for Claude Code: the autonomous dev loop stack and CSS/design-drift auditing.

plugins.name: loop-stack
plugins.description: Universal, config-driven autonomous dev loop stack: session crons that fix assigned bugs, verify against AC + deploys, review requested PRs, shepherd your own PRs to merge, repair failed deployments, sync fix-base branches, and post a daily standup report. Project specifics live in .claude/stack.md (written by the onboarding skill).

plugins.name: css-drift-auditor
plugins.description: Universal, framework-agnostic CSS/design-drift audit pipeline: maps components and raw HTML tags, renders components in Storybook, extracts post-cascade computed styles, and flags inconsistent values for tokenization.
